name: vibin
description: Workflow, repo, GitHub, Windows, Paperless, MCP gateway, Jetpack Compose, and SWAG utility skills.

paperless_url.title: Paperless URL
paperless_url.description: Base URL of the Paperless-ngx instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

paperless_api_token.title: Paperless API Token
paperless_api_token.description: Paperless-ngx API token used in the Authorization: Token header.

swag_edge_host.title: SWAG edge SSH host
swag_edge_host.description: SSH host that owns the SWAG appdata/config directory.

swag_public_base_domain.title: SWAG public base domain
swag_public_base_domain.description: Base domain used for generated subdomains, such as example.com.

swag_proxy_confs_path.title: SWAG proxy-confs path
swag_proxy_confs_path.description: Host path to the SWAG nginx/proxy-confs directory.

swag_container_name.title: SWAG container name
swag_container_name.description: Container name used for nginx validation and logs.

swag_default_auth_method.title: SWAG default auth method
swag_default_auth_method.description: Default auth include set for new configs, such as authelia, authentik, tinyauth, ldap, or none.

swag_default_upstream_proto.title: SWAG default upstream protocol
swag_default_upstream_proto.description: Default upstream protocol for new configs.

swag_default_enable_quic.title: SWAG default QUIC setting
swag_default_enable_quic.description: Default QUIC/HTTP3 setting for new configs.

swag_reload_wait_seconds.title: SWAG reload wait seconds
swag_reload_wait_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for SWAG filewatch reload before health checks.
